title: Rand'Ore
description: Simple random ore mod for Fabric/Forge/Quilt with configurable ore generation.
body:
Adds random ore blocks to your world.

The Fabric version requires [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-language-kotlin).

The Forge version requires [Scalable Cat's Force](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scalable-cats-force).
